sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 21.39 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.21)

statement.latex: It is known that there exist residually finite, locally finite, characteristically simple groups with finitely many orbits under automorphisms (A.\,B.\,Apps, , { 81} (1983), 320--339). Are there any locally finite, characteristically simple groups with finitely many orbits under automorphisms that are not residually finite?

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory IV_PROBLEM_UNDEFINED; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
